documents.extracted_text:
Chat intelligence

Pre-process prompts with gpt-5.4-
mini ON
When on, every chat message you send is first run
through gpt-5.4-mini. The mini model rewrites your
prompt as a clearer, more directed instruction for
Claude (you still see your original message in the
chat) and emits a contextual thinking trace the UI
animates while Claude works. Adds ~1s of latency,
generally improves output quality, and replaces the
static "thinking" box with something alive.

Pieces · temporal continuity

Pieces chat LLM
Pieces fronts the inference cost for whichever model
is named here. gpt-4o and gpt-4.1 route through
Pieces' included LLM credit (no Anthropic spend).
claude-sonnet-4-5 routes through your Anthropic
key. Affects every Activity sweep + every Ask in Mind
→ Activity, plus the Briefing ribbon's hourly
background sweep.

claude sonnet 4.5
gpt-4o · free
gpt-4.1 · free
claude opus 4

Open Pieces Activity
Jump to Mind → Activity to see live sweeps, all 39
MCP tools, and the connection panel.

OPEN ↗

documents.extracted_text:
Appearance

Theme
Paper is the default. Ink is for late sessions.

paper  ink

Intelligence

AI provider
Claude Code (default) uses your Max-plan auth via
local claude -p — no API key, no per-token cost.
OpenAI is an optional fallback via Responses API
(server proxy or browser BYOK).

>_ Claude Code  ✨ OpenAI

Claude Code binary
Resolved from server PATH at startup. Prompts pipe
through stdin with --max-turns 1 --output-
format text for one-shot speed.

/usr/local/bin/claude

TEST

OpenAI API key (fallback only)
Bring-your-own-key. Calls go straight from your
browser to OpenAI via the Responses API, using
browser key · stored in localStorage only.

•••••••••• (replace)   ...   SHOW   SAVE   CLEAR

Model
Selected model for Responses API calls. Nano is
fastest, 5.4 is the ceiling.

gpt-5.4  gpt-5.4-mini  gpt-5.4-nano

Test connection (OpenAI)
Probe the OpenAI path. Use only when the OpenAI
provider is selected above.

idle

TEST

Demo mode
When on, the app still reads from
Close/ClickUp/Slack/Gmail and still reasons with AI,
but writes (send email, post Slack, create ClickUp
task, update Close) are blocked at the proxy. Reads
are always allowed. Turn off when you want real
writes to go through.

ON

now do this adjustment for the messages to be sent:

I want you to send NEPQ-style messages probing these people into phone calls. First,
second: tasting available for this month is May 3rd, May 17th, and May 31st. That's the second probing
we should always do: number one, get these people on the phone.

Got it!

Read the communication before sending text messages and emails. When you send email it has to be
rich email style with the Food calculator and the tasting invitations.

for the bot

take it easy with info... cap at automations Beta test now

What I used from the 16-minute call:
• waterfront venue
• not a traditional plated setup
• leaning more toward a free-flow / hand-held food direction
• electricity and water available

• one combined rich HTML email
• ballpark quote for 150 guests
• NEPQ-style probe pushing toward a quick call
• tasting options:
- Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM
- Sunday, May 17 at 2:00 PM
- Sunday, May 31 at 2:00 PM
• Tasting Preview
• Tasting Registration

Angle used:
• anchored to the real call, not a generic follow-up
• pushed the next step as:
